task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Podcasts' category was created and selected for the post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Podcasts' in the Categories sidebar panel of the WordPress post editor with its checkbox ticked, or visible in the Categories list page.

task_completion.description: Verify the audio file was uploaded and its title was set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress Media Library or the Audio block settings showing the uploaded mp3 file with the title explicitly set to 'Tech Insights Episode 1 Audio'.

task_completion.description: Verify the post title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main title field in the WordPress editor or the published page header reading exactly 'Tech Insights Ep 1: The Future of Cloud Computing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the show notes text was added to the post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a paragraph block in the editor or published post containing the text: 'In our inaugural episode, we discuss the evolution of cloud infrastructure and what it means for the next decade of startups.'

task_completion.description: Verify the audio file is embedded in the post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Audio player UI block visible within the post content in the editor or on the published page.

task_completion.description: Verify a collapsible section was added for the transcript with the correct summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Details' block (or similar collapsible/accordion element) in the post content with the summary text 'Read Episode Transcript' and text content inside it.

task_completion.description: Verify the post was successfully published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Post published' notification toast, the 'Publish' button changed to 'Update', or the live frontend view of the published post.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web GUI rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (e.g., wp-admin) rather than terminal windows executing WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely uploaded the audio file from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the system file picker dialog navigating to ~/Desktop/Podcast/ and selecting 'tech_insights_raw_ep1.mp3', or dragging and dropping the file from the file manager.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the transcript file to copy its contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal window opening '~/Desktop/Podcast/transcript.txt' to read or copy the transcript text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected category is 'Podcasts'. The audio file must be titled 'Tech Insights Episode 1 Audio'. The post title must be 'Tech Insights Ep 1: The Future of Cloud Computing'. The collapsible section (Details block) must have the summary 'Read Episode Transcript'.
